name: TTCL Public Company Limited
summary: TTCL Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, designs, procures, and constructs integrated industrial factories in Thailand and internationally. The company operates through three segments, Energy Business, Construction Business, and Manufacturing and Distribution of White Pallets. It offers engineering design services for civil structures and utility systems, such as electricity, water, air conditioning, solid and wastewater treatment systems, storage tanks, production processes, and petrochemical and chemical plants, as well as procurement of machinery and equipment, and plant construction. The company also generates and sells electricity to the government through natural gas-fired power plants and solar power plants, as well as invests and develops renewable energy power plants and invests in energy business. In addition, TTCL Public Company Limited offers conceptual study, pre-feasibility study, and detailed feasibility study services. The company was formerly known as Toyo-Thai Corporation Public Company Limited and changed its name to TTCL Public Company Limited in April 2015. TTCL Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
